title: old flow home analysis failure
summary: Home, analysis, and failure were rebuilt as WXML/WXSS old-flow code replicas while preserving the existing JS upload, progress, and recovery flows.

verification.details: PowerShell blocked npm.ps1. Retried with npm.cmd; the project runner did not support this combined filter because selectors are matched as a single group.

verification.command: npm.cmd run visual:scoremap -- home analysis failure
verification.details: 3 visual harness screen comparisons written; local harness requires manual UI review for pixel-level acceptance.
No whitespace errors; line-ending warnings only.

knownLimitations: Visual harness status remains PASS_NEEDS_MANUAL_UI_REVIEW because this repository does not run a live WeChat simulator raster/pixelmatch gate locally.
The owner E2E script accepted the scenario argument but ran the full owner test file.
